name: Охотник
description: You stalk prey in the wilds and elsewhere, using your abilities as a Hunter to protect nature and people everywhere from forces that would destroy them.
shortDescription: Protect Nature and People from Destruction

features.name: Hunter's Prey
features.description: You gain one of the following feature options of your choice. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can replace the chosen option with the other one.

details.colossusSlayer: {@b Colossus Slayer.} Your tenacity can wear down even the most resilient foes. When you hit a creature with a weapon, the weapon deals an extra {@damage 1d8} damage to the target if it's missing any of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. You can deal this extra damage only once per turn.
details.hordeBreaker: {@b Horde Breaker.} Once on each of your turns when you make an attack with a weapon, you can make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature that is within 5 feet of the original target, that is within the weapon's range, and that you haven't attacked this turn.

features.name: Hunter's Lore
features.description: You can call on the forces of nature to reveal certain strengths and weaknesses of your prey. While a creature is marked by your {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, you know whether that creature has any Immunities, Resistances, or Vulnerabilities, and if the creature has any, you know what they are.
